description: Revamp LogicalGameScreen.kt UI to match the web frontend style - add background image, gold-themed styling, click/hover sounds, and enhanced card styling. DO NOT change any ViewModel calls or game logic.
steps: Step 1: Read the current LogicalGameScreen.kt to confirm existing ViewModel calls.

Step 2: Revamp LogicalGameScreen.kt UI: (a) Add GameBackground with URL 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/images/asset/games/background/logical-background-large.webp'. (b) Make Scaffold/TopAppBar background transparent so the background image shows through. (c) The gold color theme (#d4af37) is already used - keep it. Style the question card with semi-transparent dark background (rgba(20,20,20,0.8) = Color(0xCC141414)) and a gold border, matching the web .logical-card style. (d) Style answer options with semi-transparent backgrounds and gold borders on selection, matching .logical-answer style. (e) Add SoundManager.playBgm on screen entry with URL 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/bgm/bgm-iq-normal.mp3', stop on exit. (f) Add click sound: call SoundManager.playSound with 'https://mystical-nusa.web.id/sound/sfx/click2.wav' when an answer is selected (inside the onClick of answer cards). (g) Add a progress bar styled with gold color (already exists but ensure it matches the web's .logical-progress-bar style).
Step 3: Ensure ALL ViewModel interactions remain unchanged: viewModel.startGame(), viewModel.answerQuestion(questionId, answerId), viewModel.finishGame(), and all state branches.
Step 4: Verify the result screen still shows IQ score, category, points, and duration with the same data sources.
acceptance_criteria: LogicalGameScreen.kt displays a background image from the remote URL
Gold theme color is used for borders, accents, and text highlights
Question card has semi-transparent dark background with gold border
BGM plays on screen entry and stops on exit
Click sound plays when selecting an answer
All ViewModel function calls remain identical
Result screen still displays IQ, category, points, duration correctly
verification: Read LogicalGameScreen.kt and verify ViewModel calls unchanged
Verify SoundManager usage for BGM and click sounds
Verify GameBackground composable usage with correct URL
findings: Revamped LogicalGameScreen.kt following IntuitionGameScreen pattern. Added GameBackground with logical-background-large.webp. Transparent Scaffold/TopAppBar. Question card and pre-game card use MysticDarkOverlay + gold border. Answer options use Color.White.copy(alpha=0.05f) for unselected matching web rgba(255,255,255,0.05). Gold border on selection. BGM plays on entry, stops on exit. Click sound on answer selection. All ViewModel calls (startGame, answerQuestion, finishGame) preserved unchanged. Pre-game orb gradient changed from MysticPurple to MysticGold for consistency. No Android SDK for build verification.
